description.en: Local control and monitoring for Hikvision AX PRO wireless alarm panels (DS-PWA96). Arm/disarm, per-detector temperature, door/contact, motion, tamper and battery. Built with ❤️ by Ulf Holmström.
description.sv: Lokal styrning och övervakning av Hikvision AX PRO trådlösa larmpaneler (DS-PWA96). Till-/frånkoppling, temperatur per detektor, dörr/kontakt, rörelse, sabotage och batteri. Built with ❤️ by Ulf Holmström.
description.nl: Lokale bediening en bewaking van Hikvision AX PRO draadloze alarmpanelen (DS-PWA96). In-/uitschakelen, temperatuur per detector, deur/contact, beweging, sabotage en batterij. Built with ❤️ by Ulf Holmström.
description.de: Lokale Steuerung und Überwachung von Hikvision AX PRO Funk-Alarmzentralen (DS-PWA96). Scharf-/Unscharfschalten, Temperatur je Melder, Tür/Kontakt, Bewegung, Sabotage und Batterie. Built with ❤️ by Ulf Holmström.
description.fr: Contrôle et surveillance en local des centrales d'alarme sans fil Hikvision AX PRO (DS-PWA96). Armement/désarmement, température par détecteur, porte/contact, mouvement, sabotage et batterie. Built with ❤️ by Ulf Holmström.
